details.test: Task 1: Solar savings estimate + full report flow
Task 2: Filter residential packages and add cheapest match to quote/project
Task 3: Book earliest available residential consultation within 14 days
Task 4: Choose financing plan (<= $150/mo, 0% down, term <= 20y) and start pre-approval
Task 5: Add high-performance solar panel to system plan/project
Task 6: Save newest battery storage blog article to reading list with note
Task 7: Generate and save instant residential quote
Task 8: Select longest-warranty equipment item and save to project with note
Task 9: Add highest-value state incentive for ZIP 85001 to named plan
